segments.text: Then all Israel from Dan to Beersheba and from the land of Gilead came together as one and assembled before the Lord in Mizpah.
The leaders of all the people of the tribes of Israel took their places in the assembly of God's people, four hundred thousand men armed with swords.
The Benjamites heard that the Israelites had gone up to Mizpah.
Then the Israelites said,
Tell us how this awful thing happened.
segments.speaker: Israelites

segments.text: So the Levite, the husband of the murdered woman, said,
I and my concubine came to Gibeah in Benjamin to spend the night.
segments.speaker: Levite

segments.text: During the night the men of Gibeah came after me and surrounded the house, intending to kill me. They raped my concubine, and she died.
segments.speaker: Levite

segments.text: I took my concubine, cut her into pieces and sent one piece to each region of Israel's inheritance, because they committed this lewd and outrageous act in Israel.
segments.speaker: Levite

segments.text: Now, all you Israelites, speak up and tell me what you have decided to do.
segments.speaker: Levite

segments.text: All the men rose up together as one, saying,
None of us will go home. No, not one of us will return to his house.
segments.speaker: Israelites

segments.text: But now this is what we'll do to Gibeah: We'll go up against it in the order decided by casting lots.
segments.speaker: Israelites

segments.text: We'll take ten men out of every hundred from all the tribes of Israel, and a hundred from a thousand, and a thousand from ten thousand, to get provisions for the army. Then, when the army arrives at Gibeah in Benjamin, it can give them what they deserve for this outrageous act done in Israel.
segments.speaker: Israelites

segments.text: The Israelites went up to Bethel and inquired of God.
They said,
Who of us is to go up first to fight against the Benjamites?
segments.speaker: Israelites

segments.text: The Lord replied,
Judah shall go first.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The Israelites went up and wept before the Lord until evening, and they inquired of the Lord.
They said,
Shall we go up again to fight against the Benjamites, our fellow Israelites?
segments.speaker: Israelites

segments.text: The Lord answered,
Go up against them.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: They asked,
Shall we go up again to fight against the Benjamites, our fellow Israelites, or not?
segments.speaker: Israelites

segments.text: The Lord responded,
Go, for tomorrow I will give them into your hands.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: While the Benjamites were saying,
We are defeating them as before.
segments.speaker: Benjamites

segments.text: the Israelites were saying,
Let's retreat and draw them away from the city to the roads.
segments.speaker: Israelites

segments.text: The Lord defeated Benjamin before Israel, and on that day the Israelites struck down 25,100 Benjamites, all armed with swords.
